title: Wire plexus.feedback.find to FeedbackService.search_feedback directly
description: Replace the current MCP-loopback implementation of plexus.feedback.find inside PlexusRuntimeModule with a direct call to FeedbackService.search_feedback + FeedbackService.format_search_result_as_dict, using shared client setup (create_client, resolve_account_id_for_command, memoized scorecard/score resolvers). Add focused tests with an injectable service. The MCP-backed path should be removed once the direct path is in, with no fallback.

comments.author: ryan
comments.text: Wired plexus.feedback.find to FeedbackService.search_feedback directly. Removed (feedback, find) from MCP_TOOL_MAP and added a per-method DIRECT_HANDLERS registry that PlexusRuntimeModule._call consults before any MCP loopback (no fallback). _default_feedback_finder runs the same chain that the existing MCP tool uses (create_client, resolve_account_id_for_command, memoized scorecard/score resolvers, FeedbackService.search_feedback, format_search_result_as_dict). PlexusRuntimeModule and _execute_tactus_tool gained an injectable feedback_finder parameter for tests. plexus.api.list still advertises plexus.feedback.find via the merged catalog. Eight new focused tests cover: injectable finder skips MCP loopback, budget records exactly one tool_call, missing-args validation, catalog listing, MCP_TOOL_MAP exclusion guard, default-chain monkeypatch through resolvers and service, end-to-end via _execute_tactus_tool, and missing-args surfacing as tactus_execution_failed end-to-end. 41 of 41 focused tests pass.
